title: The Elevate Show Is happening NOW!
excerpt:

posts.author: Julietteb (Juliette )
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Community!

The Elevate Show is TODAY and you can still sign up and get access to awesome content, including efficiency tips, product-focused Master Classes and more. Plus, leadership legend Robin Scharma will be speaking at this year’s Elevate show!!

Check back on or awesome community forum and facebook group for Elevate recaps, discussions, feature updates and more!

posts.author: Julietteb (Juliette )
posts.cookedHtml:
Some more details:

This year we are live streaming in three different time zones so that no matter where you are in the world, you can tune in!

This year, you can expect:

  • Opening remarks on the future of work - with Roy Mann and Eran Zinman, our co-founders and CEOs
  • Inside scoop on new features and updates that are taking monday.com to the next level in 2023 - with Shirley Baumer, our product director
  • Product-focused Master Classes to give you the skills you need to maximize efficiency - with monday experts.
  • Work it Out Talks with insights to help you get ahead of the curve - with monday.com leaders.
  • Customer Stories from industry leaders for business guidance and inspiration

Stay tuned for community conversations, recaps and more!

posts.author: Julietteb (Juliette )
posts.cookedHtml: Hey community! In case you were unable to attend The Elevate Show at the LIVE showing, you can still watch at Elevate 2022 by monday.com . Make sure to also check out the product sections and Elevate on demand for more great content. Let us know your thoughts
